---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear, one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

How should this work? Include API design, UI changes, or configuration options if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you considered and why they were rejected.

## Additional Context

Any related issues, links, or prior art.
